recommendations: Create dedicated f-3 API and E2E specs covering fallback correlation mapping.
Remove skip markers from Epic F ATDD suites and stabilize fixtures.
Ensure each Epic F story has at least one active UI-level acceptance scenario.
summary: Coverage is the weakest dimension due to missing f-3 tests and extensive skipped ATDD suites.
